script.openingLine: Replay begins in Kansas City, where Colombia meet Ghana in the round of 32.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia meet Ghana in the round of 32 at Kansas City Stadium.
moments.explainer: The journey begins with both sides level and the knockout tie ahead.

moments.spokenLine: Jhon ARIAS is shown a card for Colombia.
moments.explainer: An early disciplinary mark enters the record for Colombia.

moments.spokenLine: Jhon ARIAS scores for Colombia, moving the verified score to 1–0.
moments.explainer: The match has its first decisive swing, with Colombia taking the lead.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia lead Ghana 1–0 at the interval.
moments.explainer: The half closes with Colombia in front and Ghana still within one goal.

moments.spokenLine: Caleb YIRENKYI is shown a card for Ghana.
moments.explainer: Ghana's disciplinary record grows as the second half begins.

moments.spokenLine: Abdul FATAWU is shown a card for Ghana.
moments.explainer: Another card is recorded for Ghana while Colombia's 1–0 lead stands.

moments.spokenLine: Alidu SEIDU is shown a card for Ghana.
moments.explainer: Ghana's disciplinary tally continues to rise with the score still 1–0.

moments.spokenLine: Richard RIOS is shown a card for Colombia.
moments.explainer: Colombia now have a disciplinary moment of their own in the closing phase.
The single goal from Jhon ARIAS separates the teams at full time.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Colombia meet Ghana in the round of 32 at Kansas City Stadium.
In the 12th minute, Jhon ARIAS is shown a card for Colombia.
In the 14th minute, Jhon ARIAS scores for Colombia, moving the verified score to 1–0.
In the 49th minute, Caleb YIRENKYI is shown a card for Ghana.
In the 66th minute, Abdul FATAWU is shown a card for Ghana.
In the 76th minute, Alidu SEIDU is shown a card for Ghana.
In the 78th minute, Richard RIOS is shown a card for Colombia.
At full-time, Colombia finish ahead of Ghana, 1–0.
